headline: BKR to Build AI Power Solutions With Google Cloud for Data Centers
summary: Baker Hughes partners with Google Cloud to launch AI-driven solutions for data centers, targeting efficiency gains and lower emissions.

headline: 4 Oilfield Services Stocks Set to Gain From Strong Industry Tailwinds
summary: Low reliance on debt should enable oilfield service companies to access capital on favorable terms in a volatile business environment, underpinning a promising outlook for the Zacks Oil and Gas- Field Services industry. HAL, BKR, FTI and AROC are well poised to gain.
